evals.prompt: Create a 2D interactive activity for free body diagrams. Students should be able to drag force arrows onto an object and label them. AP Physics, exploratory mode.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file with drag-and-drop force arrows, an object in the center, labeling UI, dark theme, Proctor Bridge (exploratory mode), saved to Simulations/AP Physics/

evals.prompt: Build me an interactive evidence classification activity for forensic science. Students get a set of evidence cards and need to drag them into the correct category: physical evidence, biological evidence, or trace evidence. Make it graded.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file with evidence cards, three drop zones for categories, graded mode with PortalBridge.answer() calls, scoring, dark theme, saved to Simulations/Forensic Science/

evals.prompt: I need a projectile motion explorer where students can adjust launch angle and initial velocity with sliders and see the trajectory update in real time on a canvas. Show the max height and range as calculated values. AP Physics, exploratory.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file with canvas trajectory visualization, sliders for angle and velocity, real-time updates, displayed calculations for max height and range, coordinate axes, dark theme, Proctor Bridge (exploratory), saved to Simulations/AP Physics/
